title: Everbuild Jetcem Deep Rapid Repair Sand and Cement, Grey, 6 kg
features: Quick Repairs: 30 minute setting time provides a perfect solution where a fast repair job is required.
Deep Fill: Fills up to 15cm in one application.
Internal and External Use: Seals and repair cracks and holes in both internal and external environments with weatherproof properties.
Strong Setting Properties: Strong setting properties suitable for repairs to concrete, stone and brick substrates.
description: From the manufacturer Jetcem Deep Rapid Repair Sand & cement Jetcem Rapid Setting Sand & Cement is the ultimate cement based product suitable for when a fast repair job is needed. It’s strong and deep fill properties repair deep holes and cracks of up to 25-150mm in concrete, stone and bricks substrates. Suitable for both internal and external repairs Jetcem Rapid Setting Sand & Cement is the perfect solution for repairing cracks on walls, floors, kerbstones, pointing brick and stone, along with sealing leaks. Uses Internal and external repairs to gaps, cracks, walls and floors. Repairing flags, slabs, stones and bricks. Patching steps and window sills. Discover the Benefits Rapid setting (30 minutes) Fills deep hole from 2.5-15cm in one application Pre mixed, ready to use, just add water Internal and external repairs Suitable for deep holds in concrete, stone and brick Sets in the cold and wet Suitable for leak sealing in concrete based surfaces Available in 2kg and 6kg bags Rapid Setting Time Specifically formulated to provide a quick setting time of 30 minutes suitable for quick repair jobs. Deep Fill Repairs cracks and holes of up to 15cm depth in one applications. Internal and External Repairs Excellent weatherproof properties for use on substrates in both internal and external environments. Trusted by Professionals Trusted and well used by trade professional. Jetcem provides the perfect solution for leak sealing, point, patching and much more in brick, cement and stone substrates.
